zh.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire East, C: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可

zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Maria Brereton於1481年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，她的父親Andrew Brereton33歲，母親Agnes Legh36歲。她於1498年7月17日與John Davenport Esq.在英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1530年在英國爾切斯特享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Maria Brereton于1481年出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可时，她的父亲Andrew Brereton33岁，母亲Agnes Legh36岁。她于1498年7月17日与John Davenport Esq.在英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1530年在英国爾切斯特享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Maria Brereton was born in 1481, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, her father, Andrew Brereton, was 33 and her mother, Agnes Legh, was 36. She married John Davenport Esq. on 17 July 1498, in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1530, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Maria Brereton est née en 1481, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Andrew Brereton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes Legh, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Davenport Esq. le 17 juillet 1498, à Brereton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1530, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Maria Brereton 1481 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Brereton 33 und ihre Mutter Agnes Legh 36. Sie hat am 17. Juli 1498 in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Davenport Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1530 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Maria Brereton è nata il nel 1481 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Andrew Brereton, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Agnes Legh, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Davenport Esq. il 17 luglio 1498, nel Brereton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1530, nel Chester, Cheshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Maria Breretonが1481年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父Andrew Breretonは33歳，母Agnes Leghは36歳であった。1498年7月17日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトンでJohn Davenport Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1530年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Maria Brereton(이)가 1481년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Brereton(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Legh(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1498년 7월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴에서 John Davenport Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1530년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Maria Brereton nasceu em 1481, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Andrew Brereton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Legh, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Davenport Esq. em 17 de julho de 1498, em Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1530, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Maria Brereton родилась в 1481 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Andrew Brereton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Legh, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Davenport Esq. 17 июля 1498 г. в местности бриретон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1530 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Maria Brereton nació en 1481, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Andrew Brereton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes Legh, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Davenport Esq. el 17 de julio de 1498, en Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1530, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
